channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 💰 Fed Kashkari: Iran War Limits Rate Guidance
item.description: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari warned that prolonged Iran war increases inflation and economic damage risks, limiting how much guidance the central bank should provide on rate policy.

item.title: 🚢 Trump Announces "Project Freedom" to Free Ships from Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump announced the US will launch a humanitarian effort on Monday to guide stranded ships out of the Iran-blocked Strait of Hormuz, calling it a "humanitarian gesture" amid ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Seeks Advantage Between Trump and Iran as War Evolves
item.description: With Trump visiting Beijing looming, China is pushing Iran to negotiate while its companies continue exporting materials that could aid Irans military, walking a delicate diplomatic line.

item.title: ⛪ Secretary of State Rubio to Meet Pope Leo This Week
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to Italy to meet Pope Leo, as Trumps criticism of the pontiff draws political backlash. The visit comes amid tensions between the administration and the Vatican.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK to Join EU 105 Billion Dollar Ukraine Loan
item.description: Britain will enter talks to join the European Unions £78 billion loan to Ukraine, deepening European defense ties as US pressure mounts. Prime Minister Starmer aims to strengthen support for Kyiv.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇲🇦 Two US Troops Missing During African Lion Military Exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two U.S. service members participating in the African Lion joint military exercises were reported missing near Tan Tan in southern Morocco. AFRICOM and Moroccan forces are conducting search operations.

item.title: 💨🇺🇸 Trump Administration Halts US Wind Farm Projects Citing National Security
item.description: President Trump's administration has brought U.S. onshore wind development to a halt, citing national security concerns. The Financial Times reports the move affects multiple pending projects.

item.title: 🇮🇱🚢 Israel Court Extends Detention of Gaza Flotilla Activists
item.description: An Israeli court extended by two days the detention of two activists arrested aboard a Gaza-bound flotilla intercepted by Israeli forces in international waters near Greece.

item.title: 💰 ECB Policymaker: Euro Zone Recession Concerns Are Real and Justified
item.description: European Central Bank policymaker Francois Villeroy de Galhau said recession concerns in the euro zone are real and justified, as the Iran war economic fallout continues to ripple through European markets.

item.title: 🌏 ADB Launches Finance Scheme for Critical Mineral Supply Chains
item.description: The Asian Development Bank launched a new financing scheme to support critical mineral supply chains, addressing global economic vulnerabilities exposed by the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🏛️ Senator Reed Criticizes Trump War Powers Stance
item.description: Senator Jack Reed criticized President Trump's handling of war powers as the 60-day War Powers Resolution deadline passed, requiring congressional action on the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🪖 Representative Crow Criticizes Trump Troop Move
item.description: Representative Jason Crow criticized President Trump's troop movements in the Iran conflict, raising concerns about congressional oversight and military escalation.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Spanish PM's Plane Makes Emergency Landing in Turkey
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's plane made an emergency landing in Turkey due to a technical fault, highlighting aviation safety concerns amid regional tensions.

item.title: 💹 Hong Kong's New Listing Pipeline Undeterred by Iran War Volatility
item.description: Hong Kong's stock market continues to see strong listing activity despite volatility from the Iran conflict, with companies proceeding with IPO plans.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Nobel Laureate Mohammadi Remains in Critical Condition in Iran
item.description: Jailed Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in a cardiac care unit in northwestern Iran, two days after being brought to hospital from prison.

item.title: 🌊 Asian Development Bank Offers Help to Pacific Countries Hit by Iran War
item.description: The Asian Development Bank announced assistance for Pacific island nations affected by economic disruptions from the Iran conflict, including shipping route changes and energy price impacts.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German Chancellor Downplays Row with Trump After Troop Drawdown Announced
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz downplayed tensions with President Trump over the announced US troop drawdown from Germany, stressing the need to work with the US within NATO.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Has Not Received Signals Suggesting Delays in Patriot Deliveries
item.description: Poland has not received any signals suggesting delays in its Patriot missile system deliveries from the United States, a government official said, amid concerns about defense commitments.

item.title: 📈 Gulf Bourses Close Higher as US-Iran Uncertainty Caps Upside
item.description: Gulf stock exchanges closed higher on Saturday but ongoing US-Iran conflict uncertainty limited gains, as investors remained cautious about regional developments.

item.title: 🚢 Bulk Carrier Reports Being Attacked by Multiple Small Craft Off Iran
item.description: A bulk carrier reported being attacked by multiple small craft off the coast of Iran, the UK Maritime Trade Operations said, in another incident threatening commercial shipping in the region.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Swedish Coast Guard Seizes Suspected False Flag Tanker in Baltic Sea
item.description: The Swedish Coast Guard seized a suspected false flag tanker in the Baltic Sea, continuing efforts to monitor suspicious maritime activity in Nordic waters amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Slovakia's PM Fico to Attend Victory Day Parade in Moscow
item.description: Slovakia's Prime Minister Robert Fico will attend Russia's Victory Day parade in Moscow on May 9, Russian television reported, continuing his stance divergent from EU partners.

item.title: ⚔️ Hezbollah Pays Steep Price in Battle to Reverse Its Fortunes
item.description: Hezbollah has paid a steep price in its fight against Israel, with hundreds of thousands displaced and as many as several thousand fighters killed, as domestic rivals harden opposition against its armed status.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Friedrich Merz's Ill-Timed Tussle with Donald Trump
item.description: Germany's new Chancellor Friedrich Merz faces an ill-timed conflict with President Trump over troop levels and NATO commitments, complicating transatlantic relations at a critical moment.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Zelensky Arrives in Yerevan for European Summit on First Armenia Visit
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Yerevan for a European summit, marking his first official visit to Armenia as Ukraine seeks to strengthen ties with Caucasus nations.
